name: Ningbo Jianan Electronics Co.,Ltd
summary: Ningbo Jianan Electronics Co.,Ltd engages in the research, development, production, and sale of smart meters, electricity information collection terminals, and energy metering boxes. Its products include single- and three-phase smart meters, intelligent power management terminals, electric energy metering boxes, distribution network automation equipment, charging piles, etc. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Cixi, China.
